campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026, adopted a new policy about how city property can be used, and discussed efforts to fill open city jobs and keep employees.
keyTopics: Transportation Authority's March 2026 investment transactions
New policy limiting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and recruitment efforts

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about plans to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties in the county. The council approved an official resolution to move forward with this cleanup work and also adopted a new technology policy for the city.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement
Resolution to proceed with cleanup on county-identified properties
New Technology Disruption Policy adoption
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial reports, authorize several contracts and agreements, and plan projects for the upcoming fiscal year. Key items included accepting a donation of lifesaving equipment, hiring a paving contractor for construction work, and submitting grant applications for statewide funding.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized road construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Submitted grant applications for statewide funding
Adopted list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 13, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize their upcoming schedules and assignments. The council reviewed what items would appear on their May 19 meeting agenda, set time limits for certain discussions, and confirmed their meeting schedule for the next fiscal year.
keyTopics: May 19, 2026 City Council meeting agenda finalized
City Council meeting schedule for Fiscal Year 2026-2027 approved
New committee and board appointments assigned by the Mayor
Staff travel request reviewed

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 19, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a special evening session on May 19, 2026 to hear the State of the City Address. The meeting also included a notice to residents about their legal rights to challenge City decisions in court within 90 days.
keyTopics: State of the City Address presentation
90-day deadline for residents to challenge City administrative decisions in court
Legal notice about Superior Court appeals of City Council actions

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to conduct city business and recognize two important observances. The council acknowledged Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month during the session.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council met to update the Health and Safety Element of Cupertino's long-term general plan (covering 2015-2040) to reflect community priorities. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work across roads, trees, sustainability, and other services during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element updates to the General Plan through 2040
Public Works Department recognition for maintenance, sustainability, and infrastructure
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 19, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, with Boardmember Albert Gonzalez participating remotely under a state law provision allowing remote participation for certain circumstances. The city continues to offer both in-person attendance and remote participation options for residents who want to watch or comment on council business.
keyTopics: Boardmember Albert Gonzalez participating remotely under SB 707 'Just Cause' provision
Hybrid meeting format available via Zoom or phone for public participation
Written public comment submission available before the meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 to address several land development matters and make a key staffing decision. The council conducted public hearings on new city rules, approved a property development permit amendment, confirmed a local assessment, and appointed a permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New city ordinances (urgency measure and regular ordinance) added to city rules
Site development permit amendment and tentative map approved for a property
Local assessment confirmed and ordered
Permanent City Manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances to meet state air quality regulations. The council reviewed proposed principles and guidelines for electrification assistance programs that would help homeowners make these upgrades.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to replace gas appliances with electric alternatives
Compliance with state air quality district regulations
Proposed principles to guide how the city assists residents with electrification
Staff presentation and environmental review status
